title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank is proud to be associated with India's most prestigious and the largest component of the Indian Armed Forces 'Indian Army'. Our Bank wishes to offer the best of services to those who offers the nation protection and ensures peace and security within its border. 
  * Usage of IDBI Bank ATM network free of cost sage of any other bank's ATM for domestic as well as international transactions free of cost - subject to RBI regulations as applicable from time to time. Free international Debit cum ATM card which can be used for cash withdrawal as well as for shopping.
  * We have specialized representatives for our preferred customers to execute your banking needs more easily.
  * Internet banking, Phone banking, Mobile banking, Mobile payment service and Account alerts. Free Bill pay, on-line tax payments, funds transfer on your savings account and much more through Internet Banking.


  * Card-to-Card Transfer facility using the Visa Money Transfer Service are available within this account.
  * We offer Investment Advisory Services and Free facility of setting up of standing instructions.


  * Access to any branch free of cost for Cheque deposit, account to account money transfer, cash withdrawal and cash deposit
  * No charges and no minimum balance accounts for the family members of Army Personnel


Get a Indian Army Salary Account in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: We are one of the proud banks that offer Indian Army salary accounts for our Indian saviours. IDBI bank has the privilege to serve our defence personnel .
